title: Academic Paper Summarizer
problem_or_desire: Overwhelmed by dense academic literature and jargon.
core_concept: A web-based tool that translates complex research papers into plain language summaries.
proposed_approach: A document upload portal that uses structured text processing to extract key findings and definitions.
prototype_scope: A text-input box that outputs a three-bullet-point summary and a glossary of terms.

title: Coffee Bean 'Flight' Subscription
problem_or_desire: Difficulty finding diverse, high-quality beans without buying large quantities
core_concept: Monthly delivery of 50g samples from 4 different global regions to allow for comparative tasting
proposed_approach: Direct sourcing from small-scale international farmers

title: Community Moderation Firewall
target_user: Slack-hosted or Discord-hosted digital service communities
problem_or_desire: Managing community quality during organic spikes of paid users joining chat rooms
core_concept: Gated community entry based on checklist requirements.
proposed_approach: A service providing manual moderation and gated entry protocols for private communities to ensure quality.
prototype_scope: Manual invite workflow gate protocols for 3 Discord communities. | Define entry checklist.; Implement manual gate protocols.; Test with 3 communities.; Gather feedback.

title: StudioPulse
problem_or_desire: Difficulty calculating the correct time allowance for revisions vs. design production
core_concept: Predictive duration simulator based on style complexity benchmarks
proposed_approach: Questionnaire interface that asks users to input dimensions, density of elements, and file type requirements
prototype_scope: An interactive form calculating an estimated project hour count based on toggle choices of design project type

title: Creative Brief Translator
problem_or_desire: The information gap between high-level client conceptual needs and individual production brief quality.
core_concept: Automated extraction of technical requirements from unstructured meeting transcripts into structured templates.
proposed_approach: A tool that processes uploaded meeting transcripts to populate a standardized creative brief template.
prototype_scope: A web interface where users upload a transcript and receive a pre-filled brief based on a fixed template. | Select target creative brief template; Develop prompt engineering for transcript extraction; Build simple file upload UI; Implement template export (e.g., PDF/Docx)

title: Meeting Action Item Executor
problem_or_desire: Action items from meetings are often forgotten or not tracked across different platforms.
core_concept: An agent that listens to meeting transcripts, extracts tasks, and assigns them to the correct project management board.
proposed_approach: Natural language processing to identify task owners and deadlines, followed by API calls to task management software.
prototype_scope: A tool that parses a meeting transcript and creates three tasks in a Trello board with correct assignees.

title: Mind Mapping Mycology
target_user: Project managers needing mental organizational structure
problem_or_desire: Hard-to-track complex logical connections between project silos
core_concept: Isometric management simulation where project nodes propagate resources.
proposed_approach: An isometric management game where project nodes are connected, and players must manage resource flow between them.
prototype_scope: A visualization engine displaying connections between one parent and three child entities. | Design isometric node system; Implement resource flow logic; Build simple UI for node management

title: Micro-Influencer Agreement Gen
problem_or_desire: Excessive manual effort preparing contracts and performance requirements for smaller-scale influencers
core_concept: Modular snippet editor for legally compliant barter-based or equity influencer deals
proposed_approach: Logic-based document generator for specific project types in the creative domain
prototype_scope: Simple PDF contract engine with adjustable performance tracking variables

title: KitchenCodex
target_user: Home hobby cooks attempting complex international cuisine
problem_or_desire: Information silos occurring during parallel recipe preparations across multi-ingredient workflows
proposed_approach: A recipe viewer that allows users to toggle between procedural and ingredient-based views.
prototype_scope: A web page with a simple timeline visualization for one recipe. | Choose one complex recipe; Build a timeline visualization; Test with a user

title: Remote Team Culture Box
problem_or_desire: Lack of shared physical experiences for distributed teams
core_concept: A subscription service that ships identical, curated activity kits to team members globally
proposed_approach: Logistics management for sourcing and shipping kits to multiple international addresses simultaneously
prototype_scope: A single-page order form for a pilot run of 10 kits to one company
